children.className: bg-card text-card-foreground flex flex-col gap-6 rounded-xl border py-6 shadow-sm @container/card w-full max-w-xl

computedStyle.boxShadow: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px 0px 0px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 1px 3px 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1) 0px 1px 2px -1px

children.className: @container/card-header auto-rows-min grid-rows-[auto_auto] items-start gap-2 px-6 has-data-[slot=card-action]:grid-cols-[1fr_auto] [.border-b]:pb-6 flex flex-col border-b @md/card:grid

children.text: Showing total visitors for this month.

children.className: col-start-2 row-span-2 row-start-1 self-start justify-self-end mt-2 @md/card:mt-0
